##RRUFFID=R070247

##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Black metallic crystals with pinkish hue. The electron microscope image shows three distinct fine-scale phases related to As and Sb content
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
